title: Github moderation
description: Specify how comments should be sent to GitHub for moderation.

owner.title: Repo owner
owner.description: This should be the user or org name.

file_path_{}.title: File path template (string)
file_path_{}.description: Specifies the file path of the new comment.

base_branch_{}.title: Base branch template (string)
base_branch_{}.description: Specifies the base branch of the new comment, e.g. `main`.

head_branch_{}.title: Head branch template (string)
head_branch_{}.description: Specifies the head branch of the new comment, e.g. `comment-123`.

commit_msg_{}.title: Commit message template (string)
commit_msg_{}.description: Specifies the commit message of the new comment.

&commit_msg_{}.title: Commit message template (file)
&commit_msg_{}.description: Specifies a file that has the commit message of the new comment.

pr_title_{}.title: PR title template (string)
pr_title_{}.description: Specifies the PR title of the new comment.
pr_title_{}.default: New comment ({{ comment.id[:8] }}) on {{ comment.subject.url }} by author `{{ author.pseudonym[:7] }}`

pr_body_{}.title: PR body template (string)
pr_body_{}.description: Specifies the PR body of the new comment.

&pr_body_{}.title: PR body template (file)
&pr_body_{}.description: Specifies a file containing the PR body of the new comment.

github_host.title: Github host
github_host.description: Only useful for enterprise instances of GitHub.
github_host.$comment: You probable don't want to change this.
